ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "urals" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Russian Ruble to the Euro */,
  "jpy" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Japanese Yen to the Euro */,
  "eur" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Euro */,
  "cny" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Chinese Yuan */,
  "krw" REAL /* Exchange rate for the South Korean Won */,
  "uah" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Ukrainian Hryvnia */,
  "rub" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Russian Ruble */,
  "usd" REAL /* Exchange rate for the United States Dollar */,
  "gbp" REAL /* Exchange rate for the British Pound */,
  "cad" REAL /* Exchange rate for the Canadian Dollar */,
  "previous_urals" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Russian Ruble to the Euro */,
  "previous_jpy" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Japanese Yen to the Euro */,
  "previous_eur" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Euro */,
  "previous_cny" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Chinese Yuan */,
  "previous_krw" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the South Korean Won */,
  "previous_uah" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Ukrainian Hryvnia */,
  "previous_rub" REAL /* Previous day's exchange rate for the Russian Ruble */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_urals FOREIGN KEY ("urals") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "commodity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity */,
  "previous_price" REAL /* Previous day's price of the commodity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the commodity price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the commodity price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodities_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodities_commodity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_type_id") REFERENCES commodity_types ("commodity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* Currency pair being monitored (e.g., EUR/USD) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user (e.g., email, SMS, in-app notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_types" (
  "commodity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, alert trigger, report generation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_prices" (
  "commodity_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity price record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_price_id")
)
